nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Palawan scops owl
nodes.summary: Palawan scops owl（Palawan scops owl，学名 Otus fuliginosus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This downlisting is not a result of this species increasing in number, but rather its demonstrated tolerance to disturbed, secondary forest habitat (i.e., the species' rate of decline is slower than previously expected, when population decline was directly associated with the loss of primary forests). This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, mining and conversion into farmlands through slash-and-burn or other methods
